steps: Plate Lenti-X cells 2.5 x 10^6/10 cm 24:00:00 before transfection.
Warm OptiMEM, X-tremeGENE HP DNA Transfection Reagent, and DNA to warm to Room temperature .
Add 1 mL OptiMEM to a tube.
Add plasmid DNA to the OptiMEM, gently pipetting to mix. A B C 1 psPAX2 0.65 pmol 4600 ng 2 pMD2.G 0.36 pmol 1400 ng 3 Transfer vector 0.82 pmol
Add X-tremeGENE HP DNA Transfection Reagent to OptiMEM/DNA ( 4 µL per 1 µg of DNA).
Add OptiMEM/DNA/X-tremeGENE to the plate of cells dropwise, then gently swirl the plate.
The day after transfection, replace the medium with
72:00:00 after transfection, collect the medium in a 15 ml conical.
Centrifuge 500 x g, °C, x 00:05:00 , then pass the supernatant through a .22 µm filter.
Add 3 mL of LentiX concentrator to the supernatant, invert 6 times to mix, then incubate Overnight at 4 °C .
Centrifuge at 1500 x g, , for 00:45:00 at 4 °C .
Remove the supernatant and resuspend the pellet in 120 µL ice cold PBS.
Make aliquots in multiples of 14 µL and freeze at -70 °C .
creator: Cole Sitron
